_meta.output_format: GeoJSON FeatureCollection — one file per table at /data/{table}.geojson
rules: Every feature MUST carry a non-empty 'source' string.
lat/lng are WGS84 decimal degrees stored in GeoJSON geometry (Point) AND as properties for convenience.
All timestamps are ISO 8601 UTC strings.
Fields marked required:true must be present and non-null on every feature.
Fields marked required:false may be omitted or null; the UI must handle absence gracefully.
No field outside this contract may be added without an approved schema-change request in /STATUS.md.
Silent field additions are rejected by the qa-integrator.

facilities.description: Industrial emission sources from EPA ECHO / FRS / TRI / GHGRP.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for the facility. Prefer EPA FRS Registry ID; fall back to a source-prefixed synthetic key (e.g. 'TRI-12345').

name.description: Facility name as reported by the source.

lat.description: Latitude of facility centroid, mirrored from GeoJSON geometry for convenience.

lng.description: Longitude of facility centroid, mirrored from GeoJSON geometry for convenience.

type.description: Facility/industry type as reported by source (e.g. 'Petroleum Refinery', 'Power Plant'). Use the source's own category string; do not normalise.

operator.description: Name of the operating company or owner. May be null if not provided by source.

pollutants.description: List of pollutant names reported for this facility (e.g. ['CO2', 'NOx', 'PM2.5']). At least one element required.

emissions_value.description: Total reported emissions quantity for the primary/largest pollutant in this record. Used to size map points.

emissions_unit.description: Unit for emissions_value (e.g. 'tons/year', 'kg/year'). Must be consistent per source; note the unit in source docs.

year.description: Reporting year for the emissions figures (e.g. 2023).

source.description: Short identifier for the data source (e.g. 'EPA-TRI-2023', 'EPA-GHGRP-2022'). Surfaced in the UI provenance tooltip.

sensors.description: Live air-quality sensor readings from AirNow, PurpleAir, and OpenAQ.

id.description: Stable unique sensor/station identifier. Use the source's own station ID, prefixed by source (e.g. 'airnow-840060370002', 'purpleair-12345').

lat.description: Sensor latitude, mirrored from GeoJSON geometry.

lng.description: Sensor longitude, mirrored from GeoJSON geometry.

aqi.description: EPA Air Quality Index (0–500+). Null if the source does not provide AQI directly (e.g. raw PurpleAir). Do not fabricate; leave null.

pm25.description: PM2.5 concentration. For PurpleAir, apply the EPA correction factor and note it in source. Null if not measured.

o3.description: Ozone (O3) concentration in parts per billion. Null if not measured.

observed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the reading (e.g. '2026-06-01T14:00:00Z'). Bound to the live-header display.

source.description: Short source identifier (e.g. 'airnow', 'purpleair-epa-corrected', 'openaq'). Surfaced in hover card.

schools.description: K-12 schools and college/university campuses from NCES and IPEDS.

id.description: Stable unique identifier. Use NCES NCESSCH for K-12 or IPEDS UNITID for colleges, prefixed by source (e.g. 'nces-123456789012', 'ipeds-100654').

name.description: Institution name as provided by NCES/IPEDS.

lat.description: Campus/school latitude, mirrored from GeoJSON geometry.

lng.description: Campus/school longitude, mirrored from GeoJSON geometry.

level.description: Education level. Exactly one of 'k12' or 'college'. Used for layer filtering and the per-campus hook.

enrollment.description: Student enrollment count. Used to size map points. Null if not available.

demographics.description: Census tract-level demographics from U.S. Census ACS. One feature per tract centroid.
demographics.note: Point geometry uses tract centroid. geoid is the primary join key for spatial operations.

geoid.description: 11-digit Census FIPS tract identifier (state 2 + county 3 + tract 6, e.g. '06037137000'). Primary join key for geo-matcher.

lat.description: Tract centroid latitude, mirrored from GeoJSON geometry.

lng.description: Tract centroid longitude, mirrored from GeoJSON geometry.

population.description: Total population estimate for the tract (ACS table B01003).

median_income.description: Median household income in the past 12 months (ACS table B19013). Null if suppressed by Census.

pct_minority.description: Fraction of population identifying as non-white alone (derived from ACS B02001). Used for the environmental-justice overlay.

wind.description: Wind speed and direction grid cells from NWS api.weather.gov.
wind.refresh: hourly via Vercel cron (same schedule as sensors)

cell_id.description: Unique grid cell identifier. Use NWS grid point reference (e.g. 'TOP-32-81') or a synthetic 'lat_lng' key if NWS does not provide a stable id.

lat.description: Grid cell centre latitude, mirrored from GeoJSON geometry.

lng.description: Grid cell centre longitude, mirrored from GeoJSON geometry.

speed_mps.description: Wind speed in metres per second.

dir_deg.description: Wind direction in meteorological degrees. Used to render drift arrows and the optional downwind flag.

observed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the wind observation (e.g. '2026-06-01T14:00:00Z').

joins/school_exposure.description: Derived join: for each school, its nearest emitters and nearest sensor AQI. Produced by geo-matcher in Phase 2.
joins/school_exposure.note: Geometry is the school point. All join results are in properties. Do not mutate schools.geojson — this is a separate derived file.

nearest_facility_ids.description: IDs of the N nearest facilities within radius R (parameters documented in ORCHESTRATION.md). Empty array if none within radius.

nearest_facility_distances_m.description: Distances to each facility in nearest_facility_ids, same order.

max_emissions_nearby.description: Max emissions_value among nearby facilities. Null if no facilities within radius.

nearest_aqi.description: AQI from the nearest sensor. Null if no sensor within radius or sensor has no AQI.

nearest_sensor_id.description: ID of the nearest sensor used for nearest_aqi.

is_downwind.description: Optional flag: true if a facility is within radius and the wind puts the school downwind of it. Null if wind data unavailable or no nearby facility.

joins/facility_demographics.description: Derived join: for each facility, the overlapping or nearest Census tract demographics. Produced by geo-matcher in Phase 2.
joins/facility_demographics.note: Geometry is the facility point. Demographics fields are joined from the intersecting or nearest tract.

geoid.description: Census tract GEOID of the intersecting/nearest tract.

population.description: Tract total population from demographics table.

median_income.description: Tract median household income. Null if Census-suppressed.
